message:
test(fwc): add comprehensive contract tests for table formatting and path resolution

Add 477 lines of tests covering the TabularFormat, TabularOptions, and
resolve_path APIs to establish baseline contract coverage:

- Trait implementation tests for Clone, Debug, Eq/Ne, Default, and Hash
  on TabularFormat and related types
- Edge case tests for resolve_path: missing intermediate keys, array
  out-of-bounds, empty paths, nested object traversal, and null handling
- TabularOptions builder tests: column selection, sort ordering, filter
  predicates, pagination parameters, and default value verification
- Format rendering tests: column width calculation, alignment, truncation
  behavior, and multi-line cell handling

These tests serve as golden fixtures to catch unintended changes to
the CLI's table output format, which is consumed by downstream scripts
and automation pipelines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
